testcase.name: Machine Card Routing › clicking Open issues on a machine card routes to tickets with open filter
testcase.error:
[chromium] › machine-card.spec.js:4:3 › Machine Card Routing › clicking Open issues on a machine card routes to tickets with open filter
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: page.waitForSelector: Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator('.machine-tile') to be visible - waiting for" http://localhost:5173/vault.html" navigation to finish... - navigated to "http://localhost:5173/vault.html"
7 | 8 | // Wait for the machines to load > 9 | await page.waitForSelector('.machine-tile', { state: 'visible' }); | ^ 10 | 11 | // Find the first machine tile and get its ID 12 | const firstMachine = page.locator('.machine-tile').first(); at /Users/nkumarsoni/TurboFix/tests/machine-card.spec.js:9:16
